channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Portable Challenges Terry G to Boxing Match, Aims to Revive His Career
item.description: Nigerian singer Habeeb Okikiola, known as Portable, has challenged fellow artist Terry G to a celebrity boxing match, claiming the fight would revive Terry G's career. The challenge came during a tele...

item.title: Spain secures second World Cup title with narrow win over Argentina
item.description: Spain claimed their second World Cup triumph after a dramatic 1-0 victory over Argentina in the final, with key moments including a late goal from midfielder Dani Olmo. The match, held in the United S...

item.title: DRC Leader Pushes for Global Standards on Mineral Governance at UN

item.title: Bari Weiss Expands Ties with Conservative Billionaires and Media Executives

item.title: Supreme Court Judge Strength to Be Raised to 38 Under New Amendment Bill
item.description: The Union law minister, Arjun Ram Meghwal, introduced the Supreme Court (Number of Judges) Amendment Bill, 2026, in the Lok Sabha to increase the number of judges in the Supreme Court from 33 to 37, e...

item.title: Agriculture Education and Careers in Kenya

item.title: Philippine Power Rates Exceed Singapore's in June
item.description: A recent report highlights that the average electricity rates in the Philippines during June were significantly higher compared to Singapore. The data, released by the Energy Regulatory Commission, in...

item.title: 26-Year Housing Delays for Land Claimants in South Africa
item.description: In Buffalo City, approximately 2,000 beneficiaries of the West Bank Restitution Project remain without housing 26 years after their land claims were settled. The housing project, intended to provide 2...

item.title: PM Highlights Role of Modernized Railways in Boosting Regional Connectivity and Economic Growth

item.title: Oil prices fluctuate as Iran-U.S. negotiations and Middle East tensions shape market dynamics

item.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Individual Awards: Rodri and Mbappe Lead Honors
item.description: The FIFA World Cup 2026 concluded with Spain dominating the individual awards, as Rodri secured the Golden Ball for his outstanding performances. Mbappe claimed the Golden Boot for being the top score...

item.title: Prisons Minister Lord Timpson resigns after reforming UK prison system
item.description: Lord James Timpson, the UK's prisons minister, has resigned from his post following nearly two years in office. Appointed in July 2024 after leaving his role as CEO of the Timpson group, he oversaw si...

item.title: Firefighters Rescue Missing Dog from San Francisco Bay After Weeks of Search
item.description: A dog that had been missing since the Fourth of July holiday was rescued after being spotted swimming in San Francisco Bay, according to the Menlo Park Fire Protection District. The incident occurred ...

item.title: International Support for West Philippine Sea Ruling Grows
item.description: The Stratbase Institute reported that 18 governments have explicitly recognized the 2016 Arbitral Award on the West Philippine Sea (WPS) as legally binding, with additional support from 17 countries. ...

item.title: Nairobi Florist Celebrates Life's New Path with Graduation Photoshoot
item.description: Abby Wambui, a Nairobi-based florist, dropped out of her mass communication degree in 2016 after becoming a mother. After losing her child's father last year, she accepted she wouldn't return to finis...

item.title: Chanel's New Coco Mademoiselle Crush Absolu Perfume Review

item.title: South Africa Trials 62 Accused in 2021 Unrest Linked to WhatsApp Groups
item.description: Nearly five years after South Africa's deadliest unrest in the democratic era, 62 individuals are set to face trial in the KZN High Court for charges of terrorism, sedition, and insurrection. The accu...
